generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for their defense, while our own preparedness is slipping? A recent report shows that 68% of NATO members are not meeting their spending commitments, leaving us to shoulder an unfair burden. Strengthening our alliances is crucial, but we must also ensure our own security isn't compromised. It's time to demand accountability and a balanced approach to national defense. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
